name: Sizzling Sweet & Sour Seafood
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb medium-size raw shrimp (shelled and deveined)
1 green pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch squares
5 whole green onions, cut into 1/2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine sugar, white wine vinegar, chicken broth, soy sauce, dry sherry, and cornstarch for the cooking sauce. Set aside.
2. Heat wok or wide frying pan over high heat. When hot, add 3 tbsp oil.
3. Add garlic and ginger to the pan. Stir once, then add shrimp and scallops.
4. Stir fry until shrimp turn pink and scallops are opaque throughout (about 3 minutes). Remove from pan and set aside.
5. Heat remaining 3 tbsp oil in the pan. Add carrot and bamboo shoots. Stir fry for 3 minutes, adding a few drops of water if the pan appears dry.
6. Add pepper, onion, and salt to the pan. Stir fry for one minute.
7. Return shrimp and scallops to the pan. Stir in the cooking sauce, then pour into the pan.
8. Cook, stirring, until the sauce bubbles and thickens. Turn off heat, cover, and keep hot while frying sizzling rice as directed.
9. Transfer seafood mixture to a preheated bowl. Serve hot fried rice cakes on a platter and immediately pour over the seafood mixture.
